# Mavai Schweiz (mavai.ch)

> mavai.ch tracks **AI regulation and compliance in Switzerland** — what is
> changing, what it means, and what to do about it. It covers Swiss and
> international rules that bear on AI systems used by Swiss enterprises and
> cantonal government: FINMA supervisory expectations, ISO/IEC 42001 (AI
> management systems), the EU AI Act and its spillover into Switzerland, and
> related standards. The audience is business managers, compliance officers,
> and IT leaders — not developers.

mavai.ch is the Swiss, regulation-focused companion to mavai.org, the technical
home of the open-source probabilistic-testing frameworks (punit, feotest,
mavai-R). Where a regulation calls for evidence that a non-deterministic AI
system performs within stated bounds, mavai.org provides the testing tooling
that produces it. The site is published in English, German (Swiss orthography),
French, and Italian.

## Pillar guide

- [AI regulation in Switzerland: what's changing and what to do about it](https://mavai.ch/en/ai-regulation-switzerland/): Practical overview of FINMA expectations, ISO 42001, the EU AI Act's Swiss spillover, and how to respond. Also in [German](https://mavai.ch/de/ai-regulation-switzerland/), [French](https://mavai.ch/fr/ai-regulation-switzerland/), and [Italian](https://mavai.ch/it/ai-regulation-switzerland/).

## Regulation references

- [FINMA & AI in banking](https://mavai.ch/en/regulations/finma/): How FINMA's supervisory expectations affect AI adoption in Swiss financial institutions.
- [ISO/IEC 42001](https://mavai.ch/en/regulations/iso-42001/): The international standard for AI management systems and what it requires.

## Sections

- Regulation News: https://mavai.ch/en/regulations/
- Insights (analysis and commentary): https://mavai.ch/en/posts/
- Timeline: https://mavai.ch/en/timeline/
- About: https://mavai.ch/en/about/
- Contact: https://mavai.ch/en/contact/

## Related

- mavai.org — the technical project family and probabilistic-testing tooling: https://mavai.org/
